markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review Phase 1 content performance and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance is on track:** 9 articles will be live this week, with all indexed by Google and ranking well (e.g., avg. pos. 9), matching the pace of other GrowthX clients.](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [**Comparison posts are key for AI visibility:** This week's new comparison articles are expected to accelerate LLM citation growth, a key metric for the partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [**Critical tracking needed for messaging strategy:** Panther requires separate CheckThat tracking for "AI SOC" vs. "SIM" messaging to inform a major category and messaging decision tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [**Phase 1 report due Friday:** Aida will deliver a summary with benchmarks to support the decision, and will coordinate with Kathy on the dual-tracking setup.](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)

## Topics

### Phase 1 Performance Review

  - [The goal of Phase 1 (week 6 of 8) is to validate content quality and align on a roadmap for scaling to 5 articles/week in Phase 2.](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [**Key Metrics & Insights:**](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
      - [**Publishing:** 9 articles will be live this week (4 live, 3 approved, 2 pending review).](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
      - [**Google Indexing:** All published content is indexed, a positive sign indicating no technical issues are blocking visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**Google Search Console (GSC):** New posts are already generating impressions and ranking well (e.g., avg. pos. 9).](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
      - [**Google Analytics 4 (GA4):** The Looker dashboard shows sessions and engagement rates, with engaged sessions (duration \>10s, scroll, click) being a critical SEO signal.](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)

### CheckThat & LLM Citation Tracking

  - [CheckThat tracks how often Panther's content is cited by LLMs, a key metric for AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [**Critical Need:** Panther requires separate tracking for "AI SOC" vs. "SIM" messaging to inform a major category and messaging decision tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
      - [**Action:** Aida will add initial "AI SOC platform" prompts to CheckThat today to provide data for the meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
      - [**Long-term:** Kathy will investigate setting up a dual-instance tracking solution.](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [**Competitive Analysis:** The CheckThat "Sources" tab reveals which competitors (e.g., SentinelOne) dominate LLM responses, guiding Panther's content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)

### Content & Website Strategy

  - [**Comparison Posts:** This week's new comparison articles are expected to accelerate LLM citation growth, a strategy that has proven highly effective for other GrowthX clients.](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [**CTA Implementation:**](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
      - [GrowthX will add CTAs to all new and existing blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
      - [Panther's current tech allows for bottom-of-post or sticky sidebar CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
      - [**Decision:** Implement both. The bottom CTA captures highly engaged readers, while the sidebar provides a persistent option despite potential banner blindness.](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
  - [**Technical SEO Audit:**](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)
      - [GrowthX is conducting an audit to identify issues (e.g., broken links, speed) that could hinder rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)
      - [Panther is also planning a website update to align with its "AI SOC" messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will re-run its audit (using Screaming Frog) after Panther's site changes are live to ensure no new issues were introduced.](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
      - [Add Shannon as a CheckThat user.](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
      - [Add initial "AI SOC platform" prompts to CheckThat today.](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
      - [Deliver the Phase 1 summary report with benchmarks by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
      - [Coordinate with Kathy on the dual-tracking setup for "AI SOC" vs. "SIM" messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [**Katie & Shannon:**](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
      - [Review the new comparison blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [**Panther Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
      - [Implement both bottom-of-post and sticky sidebar CTAs on the blog.](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
      - [Notify GrowthX when website updates are complete to trigger the re-audit.](https://fathom.video/share/z_zrkyisEySa5Pwtxx7Y9TTsvEM3XJpP?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
